Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Empire (Cradle)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Empire is a political entity.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan has homes in the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Empire contains great clans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen and Lindon are currently in the real Empire.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — The Empire is capable of executing a clan if they detect them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan refers to his beloved Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan's actions may have indirectly led to the destruction of the entire Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon wishes to serve the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — The Empire is described as having the biggest hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — The Skysworn will not put Lindon's group anywhere that could hurt the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The Empire is in a crisis.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The Empire will punish Lindon and Yerin lightly for their absence.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — The Empire is the political entity the Skysworn serves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The Empire is described as tiny and insignificant by the Monarch.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos passes through a portal back to the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The Blackflame boy was near the border of Empire territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — The Akura are located within the Empire.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Empire has better lines of communication than the Frozen Blade school.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Saeya tells Lindon to present himself to the Emperor when he returns to the Empire.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — The Empire has members who can borrow Monarch power.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
